# Comments
  # There are 25 of these lil boxes, corresponding to the number of independent runs I think 
  # these boxes roughly align with where the values are on the graph
  # so each number will be the fitness value at each iteration 
  # this has the same number of lines as the DMA 640, so I think the dimensions aren't captured here
  # why are there this iteration of things in each of the lil boxes, theres 42 in each 
  # its 41 numbers in each one, because step size is >= FES_MAX not just > 
  # two modes, training and testing 
  # for testing gives a buffer of two more generationes, from the + POP_SIZE * 2, is why its 42

# each of these corresponds to an all_fitness_values in ppo_es_model 
# each one of these is the best fitness value achieved so far 



# all the arrays combined, are all_fitness_values
  # num of arrays is the value of NUM_RUNS
  # inner dimension is about equal to fes__max / pop_size
# this whole array is a "fitness values"
  # each fitness value within these arrays is the best up to that point, over all generations not just the current one
[[232.68936954 223.5182813  208.32715582 195.6711389  186.07546746 # each indivudal number is a fitness value
  175.86414573 166.16399115 157.91914268 151.38435866 140.40178463
  138.62452974 119.53598765 110.86720079 110.86720079 110.12190737
  107.66254273 107.66254273 107.66254273 107.66254273 107.66254273
  107.66254273 107.66254273 107.66254273 107.66254273 107.66254273
